news.summary: Today in Phoenix, the Desert Financial Foundation honored 62 Arizona students with college scholarships worth a total of $198,000. These scholarships were granted in recognition of the students' dedication to community service, resilience, and commitment to making a difference in the lives of others.
news.headline: Desert Financial Foundation awards $198,000 in scholarships to 62 Arizona students for community service.

news.summary: Starting from today, Uber customers across the United States have the opportunity to access a wide range of unique Turo vehicles seamlessly through the Uber platform. This collaboration was confirmed by Turo, the leading peer-to-peer car sharing marketplace globally, and Uber Technologies, Inc. As of May 15, 2025, customers can now directly rent Turo vehicles via the Uber app, enhancing the transportation options available. This joint effort expands the choices for Uber users by providing access to Turo's diverse fleet.
news.headline: Turo and Uber partner to offer peer-to-peer car sharing on Uber Rent for U.S. customers, effective May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Planview has been recognized as a top leader in The Forrester Wave™ for Value Stream Management (VSM) Solutions for the second quarter of 2025. This acknowledgment highlights Planview's exceptional performance and capabilities within the VSM sector. The company's dedication to providing high-quality VSM solutions has positioned them prominently in the industry. This recognition solidifies Planview's standing as a leading provider, further exemplifying their commitment to innovation and excellence in the VSM market.
news.headline: Planview named a Leader in Forrester's Wave: Value Stream Management (VSM) Solutions, Q2 2025, based in Austin, Texas.

news.summary: Oshkosh Corporation (NYSE: OSK), a prominent manufacturer of purpose-built vehicles and equipment, is set to hold an Investor Day in New York City on Thursday, June 5, 2025, starting at 9:30 a.m. EDT. John Pfeifer, the company's president and CEO, will be accompanied by Matthew Field, the executive vice president and CFO, as well as other key senior executives. The event will offer a detailed examination of Oshkosh Corporation’s strategic plans, key technologies, capital investment strategies, and financial priorities.
news.headline: Oshkosh Corp to hold Investor Day on June 5, 2025 in NYC at 9:30am EDT. John Pfeifer & team to discuss strategic initiatives, tech, and finance.
Following Medinsky's statement, the Russian delegation headed to the presidential office in Dolmabahce, where negotiations with Ukraine are expected- reports.

news.summary: In Chicago as of May 15, 2025, it has been reported that the worldwide market for Surface Disinfectants is estimated to be worth USD 6.25 billion in 2024. The market is anticipated to escalate to USD 9.49 billion by 2030, showcasing a 7.2% Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR). These statistics are derived from a recent analysis conducted by The Research Insights. The surge in demand for these products is attributed to the preferences of contemporary consumers and various establishments for enhanced cleanliness and hygiene standards.
news.headline: Surface Disinfectant Market projected to reach $9.49 billion by 2030, growing at 7.2% CAGR globally.

news.summary: A 12-week executive framework created by Padmasini Dayananda aims to address the issues of career reinvention, brand visibility, and burnout recovery. This initiative specifically targets senior women in technology industry who are facing challenges such as attrition, burnout, and career stagnation. The program is designed to support these women in navigating and overcoming these obstacles. Padmasini Dayananda, a multi-award-winning tech executive, developed this program in response to the increasing need for support in this sector. The framework seeks to provide guidance and tools for women looking to make a positive change in their careers, with a focus on helping them achieve greater visibility and success.
news.headline: UK tech veteran Padmasini Dayananda launches 12-week program to elevate women leaders in tech with a focus on career reinvention, brand visibility, and burnout recovery.

news.summary: Due to the impact of tariffs, retailers are reducing orders for imported goods. In response to this shift, companies specializing in the resale of excess or returned merchandise are poised to play a pivotal role in addressing the situation. This trend is highlighting the importance of these businesses in managing inventory fluctuations and meeting consumer demand amidst challenging market conditions.
news.headline: With tariffs affecting foreign goods, businesses handling overstocked/ returned items are flourishing to bridge the gap.

news.summary: Several customers who purchased tickets at a high price for the Cowboy Carter Tour are now disappointed as prices have decreased. Meanwhile, other individuals who waited are now taking advantage of the reduced prices.
news.headline: Prices for Beyoncé's Cowboy Carter Tour vary, with some fans feeling miffed as costs drop while others benefit from procrastinating.

news.summary: Coinbase recently reported a significant cybersecurity incident involving insider abuse and data theft. A threat actor demanded a $20 million Bitcoin ransom, which the company declined to pay. Instead, Coinbase offered a $20 million reward for information that leads to the arrest and conviction of the culprits. The breach included personal user data such as names, contact details, masked bank and SSN data, and government IDs. Overseas support contractors were reportedly bribed by the attackers to obtain internal documentation. The full details are outlined in a Form 8-K filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission on May 15.
news.headline: Coinbase faces data breach, rejects $20M ransom demand, offers bounty for perpetrator info.

news.summary: Perpetrators have issued a ransom request of $20 million in Bitcoin, stipulating that they will expose purloined client information if Coinbase fails to comply.
news.headline: Coinbase faces data breach, extorted for $20 million in Bitcoin by hackers threatening to leak customer data.

news.summary: Rocky Linux has unveiled an enhanced version providing better performance, enterprise-level stability, and security for model tuning and inference. The launch took place in RENO, Nev. on May 15, 2025. CIQ, the primary support and services partner of Rocky Linux, is well-known for developing top-notch software that delivers exceptional results.
news.headline: CIQ introduces Rocky Linux optimized for AI: Enhanced performance, stability, and security. Founded in 2025.

news.summary: A recent report by Grand View Research, Inc. forecasts that the worldwide flooring market is poised to reach a value of USD 534.6 billion by 2030. This market is expected to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.8% from 2025 to 2030. The projected increase in market size is primarily driven by the uptick in construction projects globally.
news.headline: Global flooring market to reach USD 534.6 billion by 2030 with 6.8% CAGR from 2025, per Grand View Research.

news.summary: In a significant development, ENGIE North America (ENGIE) has recently formed a collaboration with funds overseen by CBRE Investment Management (CBRE IM) for a collection of battery storage assets in Texas. This partnership marks one of the largest financing transactions in the realm of battery storage to date. The deal, finalized on May 15, 2025, involves a substantial sum of capital being invested in a portfolio of battery storage assets located in Texas. This move signifies a key milestone in the growing trend towards sustainable energy solutions and marks a noteworthy advancement in the field of renewable energy technology.
news.headline: ENGIE partners with CBRE Investment Management for 2.4 GW Battery Storage Assets in the U.S., one of the largest financing deals in the sector.

news.summary: In San Francisco on May 15, 2025, it was reported that Docusign has been named a finalist for the 2025 SAP® Pinnacle Award in the New Partner Application category. This prestigious recognition highlights the company's excellence in this area. The SAP Pinnacle Awards are given annually to celebrate the achievements of top SAP partners, with finalists like Docusign standing out for their impactful contributions.
news.headline: Docusign is a finalist for a 2025 SAP® Pinnacle Award in the New Partner Application category, as announced on May 15, 2025. 111 characters.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Venice, California, Kindo introduced WhiteRabbitNeo V3, the newest iteration of its domain-specific cybersecurity and DevOps AI model. The company specializes in AI-native infrastructure and security automation. This updated model is designed for offensive and defensive purposes, showcasing Kindo's commitment to advancing in the industry.
news.headline: Kindo unveils WhiteRabbitNeo V3, its latest domain-specific cybersecurity and DevOps AI model, on May 15, 2025.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California on May 15, 2025, Ampere® revealed significant progress in its mission to provide accessible, high-performance infrastructure for AI and cloud tasks. The company introduced the Ampere Systems Builders initiative and released an additional 12 memory options for enhanced efficiency and scalability.
news.headline: Ampere launches Systems Builders program and expands AmpereOne M platforms portfolio with additional 12 memory.

news.summary: Ramblr's AI Agents for enterprises utilize ARGO's advanced sensors and Crystal waveguide displays to provide real-time task support and automated documentation for industrial workers. The company is based in Sunnyvale, California. The announcement was made on May 15, 2025, by DigiLens Inc., a prominent player in this sector. This technology aims to enhance productivity and efficiency in enterprise and industrial settings.
news.headline: DigiLens partners with Ramblr.ai to train AI agents using real-world data for enterprise workers. Calif., May 15, 2025

news.summary: Bringing extensive leadership experience in global MedTech, Duchemin joins Fotona to drive the company's growth in the next phase. Fotona, renowned for its high-performing laser systems and energy-based devices in aesthetic, dental, and gynecological fields, disclosed this news on May 15, 2025, in Dallas. This move is expected to further propel Fotona's position in the market, with the company poised for significant expansion.
news.headline: Fotona appoints Jeff Duchemin as Group President and CEO to drive growth. A leader in laser systems for various applications.

news.summary: The article by Jennifer Dodgson discusses the disruptive potential of generative artificial intelligence (AI) on the workforce, highlighting that genAI may impact 50% of tasks by over 30% of workers and 10% of tasks by 85% of the human workforce. Dodgson warns of the emergence of self-learning AI agents that autonomously achieve goals, emphasizing the shift from traditional AI to superior agents. These superior agents operate independently, self-improve, and reshape market dynamics, particularly in cryptocurrency trading. They can actively shape markets, analyze trends, and influence sentiment, posing potential risks in market manipulation. However, Dodgson argues that superior agents also hold potential for democratizing access to advanced AI technologies through decentralized infrastructure, allowing anyone to benefit from their capabilities. She predicts the AI industry value to exceed $1.8 trillion by 2030, with superior agents leading the decentralization movement in AI development. Dodgson's opinion piece encourages readers to consider the implications of embracing AI with autonomous capabilities and underscores the transformative potential of superior agents in reshaping the future of AI technologies.
news.headline: AI revolution sees rise of superior agents challenging Big Tech, with genAI set to disrupt 50% of tasks for 30% of workers, and impact 10% of tasks for 85% of workforce. Superior agents reshape market dynamics in crypto trading with autonomous manipulations. $1.8 trillion AI industry by 2030, fueled by decentralized superior agents. Decentralization battle with Big Tech ongoing.

news.summary: In 2025, the manufacturing sector is projected to see stagnant growth or a slight expansion, with an estimated 0.1% increase in revenue. Capital expenditures are expected to decrease by 1.3%, and capacity utilization is forecasted to be at 79.2%. Conversely, the services industry is anticipated to remain flat, with no change in revenue from 2024. Capital expenditures for services are projected to decrease by 3.3%.
news.headline: ISM projects flat economic activity through 2025 with manufacturing revenue expected to increase by 0.1%, while capital expenditures decrease by 1.3%. Services sector's revenue is flat with a 3.3% decrease in capital expenditures. Capacity utilization stands at 79.2%.

news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland on May 15, 2025, the revolutionary AI-powered advertising platform Adwave has transitioned from private beta to public access. By integrating sophisticated AI and behavioral science, Adwave offers a powerful tool for creators, entrepreneurs, and individuals.
news.headline: Adwave launched from private beta on May 15, 2025, offering AI-driven TV advertising to creators and businesses.

news.summary: In St. Helena, California on May 15, 2025, Jayson Woodbridge, the creator of Hundred Acre Wine Group, has made history by being the initial winery/winemaker to present six wines for review and earning a flawless rating of 100 points for each from the Master of Wine, Lisa Perrotti-Brown.
news.headline: Jayson Woodbridge earns 6 perfect 100-point scores for 6 wines, marking a historic achievement in winemaking.

news.summary: This year, Nickelodeon and Spin Master Entertainment will be premiering animated specials, including a Pup-tacular Holiday Event. The specials will begin airing soon and can be followed on social media platforms like Nickelodeon, Nickelodeon Family, and PAWPatrol using the hashtag PAWPatrol. The announcement was made in Burbank, California on May 15, 2025, and the collaboration aims to bring joy and entertainment to viewers worldwide. Additionally, promotional materials and further details can be accessed by clicking the provided link.
news.headline: Nickelodeon & Spin Master Entertainment team up for 5 new Paw Patrol hour-long specials starting this year. #PAWPatrol.

news.summary: Two key executives, David Wong, Chief Product Officer, and Ryan Kessler, Head of Finance and Legal Professionals at Thomson Reuters (TSX/Nasdaq: TRI), are scheduled to speak at the CIBC Technology & Innovation Conference on May 22, 2025, at 9:10 a.m. EDT. This presentation is expected to provide insight into the company's strategies and future plans. The event will take place in Toronto.
news.headline: Thomson Reuters to present at CIBC Technology & Innovation Conference on May 22, 2025. David Wong & Ryan Kessler from Thomson Reuters speaking at 9.10 a.m. EDT.

news.summary: The new channel is set to debut a weekly podcast series, showcasing leaders and experts discussing the implications of artificial intelligence in education, society, and upcoming trends. The series will feature insights from individuals in technology, media, AI, entertainment, and various other sectors. The channel is based in San Francisco, and will offer a platform for diverse voices to explore the impact of AI in different areas.
news.headline: AI Education Project launches aiEDU Studios to explore AI's impact in classrooms, culture, & future. Weekly podcast series with leaders in tech, media, & entertainment.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, KBR disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.165 per share on its common stock (NYSE: KBR). The payment, set for July 15, 2025, will go to stockholders registered as of June 13, 2025. KBR's dividend applies to its common stock with a par value of $0.001 per share.
news.headline: KBR declares dividend of $0.165 per share on common stock to be paid on July 15, 2025 to stockholders of record on June 13, 2025.

news.summary: Three grocery chains, Family Fare, D&W Fresh Market, and Martin's Super Markets, are gearing up for "brat summer 2.0" with a new in-store section dedicated to all things related to bratwurst. The food solutions company SpartanNash® is leading this initiative in Grand Rapids, Michigan. The company, traded as Nasdaq: SPTN, is preparing to make this summer a memorable one with their latest offerings.
news.headline: SpartanNash launches Brat Shop in stores to meet grill demand; family stores prep for Brat Summer 2.0 with new destination.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, bswift® LLC, a prominent player in employee benefits technology and administration, unveiled the newest version of Emma™, its platform-level digital assistant, at a conference held for its main clients and partners. Emma™ is a cutting-edge intelligent tool designed to revolutionize the sector.
news.headline: bswift unveils AI-driven Emma Intelligence at Idea Exchange conference, revolutionizing benefits admin.

news.summary: In Ontario, there is a severe crisis in public education. Classrooms are being evacuated due to violent incidents, disrupting students' learning. Educational Assistants are overwhelmed with work, and students are lacking necessary support. Libraries are shutting down for several days because of insufficient funds. Schools are not adequately cleaned as there is a shortage of custodial staff. The situation calls for immediate attention to protect the education and well-being of students.
news.headline: Ontario School Board Council of Unions demands Ford Govt address education crisis with understaffing, funding issues ahead of budget release.

news.summary: H2O.ai, a company based in Mountain View, California, specializing in Generative AI and predictive AI technology, revealed that its H2O AI Cloud platform has attained the "In Process" status under the Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP®) at the High Impact Level. The sponsorship for this designation comes from a U.S. federal agency. This achievement now appears on the FedRAMP Marketplace, signifying progress in facilitating autonomous AI within the U.S. public sector.
news.headline: H2O.ai's H2O AI Cloud attains FedRAMP "In Process" status at High Impact Level, promoting secure AI for federal entities.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Overland Park, Kansas, the National Cable Television Cooperative, Inc. (NCTC) promoted Jeff Nourse to General Counsel. The announcement marks Nourse's transition from his previous role as Senior Vice President of Legal & Regulatory Affairs. The promotion is effective immediately, reflecting Nourse's demonstrated expertise and leadership within the organization. This move signifies a strategic decision within the NCTC, emphasizing Nourse's new responsibilities and contributions to the company's legal framework. This development aligns with NCTC's commitment to fostering talent from within its ranks and ensuring a smooth transition in key executive positions.
news.headline: Jeff Nourse promoted to General Counsel at NCTC from Senior VP of Legal & Regulatory Affairs.

news.summary: Celebrity Pamela Anderson's animal-friendly beauty brand Sonsie has revealed its complete range of products and important updates to its skincare line. The popular brand, which had been consistently selling out and accumulating waitlists, has made a comeback in New York on May 15, 2025. Sonsie, known for its vegan and cruelty-free offerings, is now available with improved skincare formulas for its loyal customers.
news.headline: Sonsie's full skincare line is back with upgraded products after months of sold-out drops.

The latest offering includes the Cordless Random Orbit, which marks a significant advancement in the industry. This launch promises complete freedom during each stage of a project and is set to revolutionize the field. Festool's commitment to innovation and quality is evident in this new lineup, setting a high standard for competitors.

news.summary: Today, Achronix Semiconductor Corporation, based in Santa Clara, California, revealed the introduction of VectorPath®, their latest offering, designed to support fast generative AI inferencing and high-performance computing (HPC) with exceptional efficiency. This launch signifies a significant advancement towards boosting processing capabilities in these fields.

news.summary: Workhuman®, a top employee recognition firm, concluded its tenth Workhuman Live event in Denver, bringing together thousands of HR executives to discuss reshaping workplace cultures. This year's event urged attendees to move beyond just accepting change, and instead take charge in driving it. The focus was on actively shaping the future of work culture rather than playing a passive role. There was a call to action for HR leaders to embrace change and become architects of their organizations' futures.
news.headline: Workhuman concludes 10th Workhuman Live conference in Denver, announces 2026 event in Orlando, FL. Theme: reimagining workplace culture.

news.summary: In Miami, an acquisition deal was revealed by I Squared Capital, a prominent global infrastructure investment manager, in partnership with MPLX LP (NYSE: MPLX) and Enbridge Inc. (NYSE: ENB). The agreement involves the purchase of a notable equity stake in the Matterhorn Express Pipeline (MXP), which functions as a crucial 2.5 billion cubic feet per day (Bcf/d) natural gas pipeline linking the Permian Basin to vital Texas demand hubs and U.S. Gulf Coast LNG export terminals. This strategic investment showcases the commitment to expanding infrastructure resources.
news.headline: I Squared Capital to acquire equity in Matterhorn Express Pipeline, a 2.5 Bcf/d gas pipeline linking Permian Basin to Texas and Gulf Coast - a strategic move.
The start time of the negotiations between Russia and Ukraine in Istanbul has not been determined; there is a possibility of postponing them to May 16 - reports

news.summary: CoreWeave Inc (NASDAQ: CRWV) exceeded sales expectations for the first quarter, announcing impressive revenue of $981.63 million. This outperformed analyst predictions of $859.77 million. Despite this success, the company reported an adjusted loss of $1.49 per share for the quarter. Year-over-year, total revenue witnessed a substantial 420% increase. Additionally, CoreWeave disclosed a significant revenue backlog of $25.9 billion at the end of the quarter. The company expressed satisfaction with the strong financial performance in the first quarter, marking the beginning of a successful year. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CoreWeave (CRWV) exceeds Q1 sales estimates with revenue of $981.63M, up 420% YoY, ending quarter with $25.9B backlog.

news.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software, Inc. will announce its fourth-quarter financial results on May 15 after the market closes. Analysts predict a loss of 5 cents per share for the New York-based company. The company is expected to report quarterly revenue of $1.55 billion, compared to $1.35 billion the previous year. On March 3, Rockstar Games, a subsidiary of Take-Two, disclosed the acquisition of Sydney-based Video Games Deluxe, which will be rebranded as Rockstar Australia. Take-Two's stock rose by 1.5% to close at $229.50 on Wednesday. For the latest analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga, where ratings can be sorted by stock ticker, company name, analyst firm, rating change, and other criteria.
news.headline: Take-Two Interactive Software (NASDAQ: TTWO) to report Q4 earnings on May 15, revenue expected at $1.55 billion. Rockstar Games acquiring Video Games Deluxe. Stock gained 1.5% to close at $229.50. More info on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: Deere & Co. (NYSE: DE) stocks are on the rise following the release of their second-quarter 2025 results, which surpassed expectations. The company saw a 16% year-over-year decline in quarterly net sales and revenue, totaling $12.76 billion, surpassing the projected $10.79 billion. Net sales for the quarter were $11.17 billion, with a total of $17.98 billion for the first half, down from $13.61 billion and $24.10 billion from the previous year. Deere's earnings per share (EPS) were reported at $6.64, lower than the $8.23 from the prior year but ahead of the consensus of $5.59. Production & Precision Agriculture net sales dropped by 21% YoY to $5.23 billion, while Small Agriculture & Turf net sales decreased by 6.5% to $2.994 billion. Construction & Forestry revenue also fell by 23% to $2.947 billion due to reduced shipment volumes.
news.headline: Deere & Co. beats Q2 expectations despite sales decline, with net sales at $12.76B and EPS of $6.64. Shares rise.

news.summary: In Boston on May 15, 2025, Q2i's Probation and Reentry Coach Application (PARCA) is experiencing increased traction as an increasing number of agencies are embracing its unique method of aiding individuals on probation and parole. Utilizing cutting-edge patented technology, PARCA simplifies supervision and offers support to a growing number of users.
news.headline: Q2i's PARCA app helps those on probation/parole with tech coaching, incentives. gaining traction with more agencies.
